info.name: Study Manager API
info.description: Postman collection for the Study Manager Django REST API. Start the Django server, run the Login request, and Postman will save the JWT access token automatically.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication requests. Register and login do not require a JWT token.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Logs in and saves accessToken and refreshToken collection variables.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Logs out on the client side. Requires Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Returns current user data plus XP and level profile.

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: Friends
item.description: Registered users, friend requests, accept/decline flow, and friends list.

request.description: Returns received pending requests, sent requests, and updates for accepted/declined requests.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Run this while logged in as the user who received the friend request.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Alternative to accept. Run while logged in as the receiver.

response.name: 200 OK
200 OK

item.name: Teams, Projects, Project Tasks, Invitations
item.description: Team CRUD, project CRUD, weighted project tasks, friend-only invitations, and accept/decline flows.

request.description: Creates a weighted task for a concrete project. If this is the only project task, the backend normalizes it to 100 priority points.

request.description: Alternative to accept. Run while logged in as the invited user.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Only the project owner can delete project tasks.
Only the project owner can delete a project.
Only the team owner can delete a team.
